inputs.label: Conversion Direction
inputs.businessContext: 0 for Cylindrical to Cartesian, 1 for Cartesian to Cylindrical

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for Cylindrical to Cartesian, 1 for Cartesian to Cylindrical
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für Zylindrisch nach Kartesisch, 1 für Kartesisch nach Zylindrisch
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour cylindrique vers cartésien, 1 pour cartésien vers cylindrique
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para cilíndrico a cartesiano, 1 para cartesiano a cilíndrico
businessContext_i18n.ar: 0 للتحويل من أسطواني إلى ديكارتي، 1 للتحويل من ديكارتي إلى أسطواني

inputs.label: Azimuth (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle in degrees, measured from positive x-axis

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle in degrees, measured from positive x-axis
businessContext_i18n.tr: Derece cinsinden açı, pozitif x ekseninden ölçülür
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel in Grad, gemessen von der positiven x-Achse
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle en degrés, mesuré à partir de l'axe x positif
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo en grados, medido desde el eje x positivo
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بالدرجات، مقاسة من المحور x الموجب

businessContext_i18n.fr: Coordonnée X dans le système cartésien
Coordonnée Y dans le système cartésien

businessContext_i18n.tr: Z koordinatı (her iki koordinat sisteminde ortak)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coordonnée Z (commune aux deux systèmes de coordonnées)
businessContext_i18n.es: Coordenada Z (común a ambos sistemas de coordenadas)

breakdown: direction === 0 ? `Step 1: Convert θ from degrees to radians: θ_rad = ${theta}° × π/180 = ${thetaRad.toFixed(4)} rad` : `Step 1: Compute r = √(x² + y²) = √(${x}² + ${y}²) = ${rResult.toFixed(4)}`
direction === 0 ? `Step 2: x = r·cos(θ_rad) = ${r} × cos(${thetaRad.toFixed(4)}) = ${xResult.toFixed(4)}` : `Step 2: θ = atan2(y, x) = atan2(${y}, ${x}) = ${thetaDeg.toFixed(4)}°`
direction === 0 ? `Step 3: y = r·sin(θ_rad) = ${r} × sin(${thetaRad.toFixed(4)}) = ${yResult.toFixed(4)}` : `Step 3: Z-coordinate remains unchanged: z = ${z.toFixed(4)}`
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
